name: SPECTRAL CAPITAL Corp
summary: Spectral Capital Corporation is a publicly traded Nevada technology company operating as a hybrid research, intellectual property, and operating business. It owns and operates telecommunications subsidiaries 42 Telecom Ltd. and Telvantis Voice Services, Inc., which provide telecommunications infrastructure, enterprise messaging, routing, and analytics services. The company also develops proprietary software, AI, and data processing intellectual property, with over 500 patentable innovations, and pursues selective acquisitions of technology-enabled businesses.
